stemHtml: What marshalling signal indicates that the pilot should engage the brakes?

options.a: Raised arm and hand with fingers extended horizontally in front of the body, then the fist is clenched.
options.b: Arms crossed and extended above the head.
options.c: Arms down, palms facing inwards, sweeping from an extended position inwards.
options.d: Hands moving horizontally with fingers extended, palms facing the ground.
